sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GCA Trades Academy gets $17,500 grant from First Hawaiian Bank via FHLB Des Moines
feed.summary: The GCA Trades Academy in Tiyan received a $17,500 grant from First Hawaiian Bank and the Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines. This donation, part of the FHLB Des Moines Member Impact Fund, will be used to provide scholarships for current and future self-paying students at the academy. First Hawaiian Bank expressed pride in supporting the academy's efforts to develop Guam's skilled trades workforce.

feed.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells Teradyne stock, buys Tesla By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cathie Wood's ARK Investment Management executed notable trades on April 6, 2026, selling 25,240 shares of Teradyne Inc. for $7.8 million across its ARKK and ARKQ ETFs. Concurrently, ARK made a significant investment in Tesla Inc., acquiring 39,691 shares for $14.3 million via its ARKK, ARKQ, and ARKX ETFs, reflecting a strong vote of confidence in the electric vehicle company. The fund also adjusted other holdings, selling shares in BWX Technologies and Cameco Corp, and buying Kodiak AI Inc.

feed.title: Fathom Holdings Inc (FTHM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Fathom Holdings Inc (FTHM) reported a robust 25% year-over-year revenue growth for the full year 2025, reaching $420 million, despite a slight decline in Q4 revenue. The company expanded its ancillary businesses significantly, with mortgage revenue up 70% and title revenue up 38% in Q4 2025. FTHM introduced new programs like Elevate and Edge, which are expected to boost transaction volume, gross profit margins, and annual recurring revenue despite challenges in the housing market and a decrease in agent licenses.

feed.title: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Keysight Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
feed.summary: This article highlights the significant returns an investment in Keysight Technologies (KEYS) would have generated over the last decade. A $1000 investment made in April 2016 would be worth over $10,000 today, outperforming the S&P 500 and gold. The company's business, driven by electronic design and test instrumentation, is poised for further growth, especially with increasing investment in AI-driven technologies.

feed.title: If You Invested $1000 in Western Digital a Decade Ago, This is How Much It'd Be Worth Now
feed.summary: An investment of $1000 in Western Digital (WDC) made ten years ago would now be worth $6,329.83, representing a 532.98% gain, outperforming the S&P 500 and gold. The company, a leading data storage device developer, recently separated its HDD and Flash businesses and is benefiting from AI-led demand in the cloud market. Analysts are forecasting further upside despite concerns about high debt and competition.

feed.title: Uber Inks Deal to Acquire Blacklane: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
feed.summary: Uber has announced an agreement to acquire Blacklane, a move aimed at expanding its premium and executive travel segment. This acquisition, expected to close by the end of 2026, will integrate Blacklane's luxury service expertise and chauffeur network with Uber's global reach to enhance its Uber Elite initiative. The deal is anticipated to strengthen Uber's position in the high-margin premium travel market, diversify revenue, and improve brand perception among affluent and corporate customers.

feed.title: Fast-paced Momentum Stock Fluor (FLR) Is Still Trading at a Bargain
feed.summary: Fluor (FLR) is highlighted as a compelling investment for those seeking momentum stocks still trading at reasonable prices. The article emphasizes FLR's recent price performance, high beta, and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), indicating strong momentum. Despite these growth indicators, FLR is noted for its attractive valuation, evidenced by a low Price-to-Sales ratio of 0.44.

feed.title: Newmont reports March decline in ASX CDIs amid transfers to NYSE common stock
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation reported a decline in its ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs) in March 2026, primarily due to transfers into its common stock listed on the NYSE. The total common shares not represented by CDIs also decreased, reflecting these transfers and movements related to employee stock compensation plans. An analyst has rated Newmont stock as a Buy with a price target of A$188.00.

feed.title: Delta (NYSE: DAL) SVP reports 17,988 shares, 14,363 restricted
feed.summary: Julia Ann McConnell, SVP – Controller and CAO of Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL), has reported direct ownership of 17,988 shares of common stock. Her holdings include 14,363 restricted common shares granted in 2025 and 2026, which will vest in scheduled installments through 2029. These grants were approved by Delta's Personnel & Compensation Committee and are exempt from Section 16(b) of the Securities Exchange Act under Rule 16b-3(d)(1).

feed.title: Anthropic taps Google and Broadcom for yet more AI chips as revenue run rate tops $30B
feed.summary: Anthropic's annual revenue run rate has surpassed $30 billion, fueled by partnerships with Google and Broadcom for AI chips to support its growing Claude services. Despite an ongoing legal dispute with the U.S. government classifying it as a "supply chain risk," the company is expanding its computing power and customer base, with over 1,000 businesses spending at least $1 million annually on its AI tools. This expansion includes access to 3.5 gigawatts of computing power from Google's TPUs, manufactured by Broadcom, starting in 2027.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock sinks as market gains: Here's why
feed.summary: This article from CNBC discusses why Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock underperformed the market today. It mentions specific factors contrbuting to the stock's decline despite broader market gains.

feed.title: Did EverCommerce’s (EVCM) Q4 Earnings and 2026 Guidance Just Shift Its SaaS and Payments Narrative?
feed.summary: EverCommerce (EVCM) recently reported its Q4 results and provided guidance for Q1 and the 2026 fiscal year, leading to a strong market reaction. The guidance, which includes revenue projections between US$612.0 million and US$632.0 million for 2026, has intensified investor focus on the company's SaaS and payments offerings. This has prompted questions about whether previous investment narratives and analyst expectations, some of which were more optimistic, need to be re-evaluated.

feed.title: Bruno Mars to be honored with Las Vegas Strip parade, street renaming
feed.summary: Bruno Mars will be honored with a Las Vegas Strip parade and a street renaming just north of Bellagio. Park Avenue will become Bruno Mars Drive, leading to Park MGM, ahead of his "Romantic Tour" opener at Allegiant Stadium. This honor was initiated by MGM Resorts International as part of his birthday celebration.

feed.title: Equinox Gold Strengthens Portfolio with Strategic Royalty Stake
feed.summary: Equinox Gold is diversifying its portfolio by acquiring an eleven percent stake in Versamet Royalties Corp., signaling a strategic shift towards focusing on mining operations in stable political regions like Canada. This move, coupled with aggressive debt reduction and the sale of non-core assets, has attracted significant institutional investment and positive analyst ratings. The company aims for strong production and cash flow from its Greenstone and Valentine Gold mines, while maintaining quarterly dividend payouts.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) surpasses market returns: Some facts worth knowing
feed.summary: This article highlights that Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) has outperformed general market returns, indicating strong performance for the company. While the provided content is minimal, the title suggests an analysis of factors contributing to CMG's success would follow.

feed.title: Seaport downgrades D.R. Horton stock rating on job market concerns
feed.summary: Seaport Global Securities downgraded D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) from Buy to Neutral due to concerns about slowing housing activity and weakening job growth, reflected in 15 analysts revising earnings downwards. The downgrade is attributed to a lower neutral job rate impacting homebuilders' efforts and undermining previous assumptions about demand stabilization. Despite these headwinds, D.R. Horton is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis with a consensus price target 14% higher than current levels.

feed.title: Newmont EVP Peter Toth Sells 3,000 Shares Under 10b5-1 Plan
feed.summary: Newmont's Executive Vice President Peter Toth sold 3,000 shares of company stock on April 1, 2026, for $113.09 per share, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This transaction leaves him with 52,315 shares. The sale is considered a routine diversification and is watched by investors for executive confidence signals, even though it's part of an automatic trading plan.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares (DUST) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive financial information for Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares (DUST), an inverse ETF designed to deliver 2X daily inverse exposure to the gold miners index. It includes real-time and after-hours stock prices, performance charts showing historical returns, and key financial metrics like net assets, yield, and expense ratio. The overview also details the fund's investment strategy and lists related tickers and sector weightings.

feed.title: Phillips 66 Faces $900 Million Loss as Iran Crisis Lifts Oil Prices
feed.summary: U.S. refiner Phillips 66 anticipates nearly $900 million in pre-tax mark-to-market losses for its first quarter due to a sharp increase in commodity prices following the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran. These losses stem from the company's net short position in various derivatives contracts and are distributed across its refining, marketing and specialties, and renewable fuels segments. The surge in oil prices, with Brent futures up 64% and West Texas Intermediate up 52% in March, was driven by global energy market disruptions caused by Iran's effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

feed.title: BofA, FDIC Given Interest Rates for $540 Million Judgment (2)
feed.summary: A federal judge has provided instructions for Bank of America Corp. to calculate pre- and post-judgment interest on a $540 million payment to the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. The pre-judgment interest will use a "regulatory rate" from FDIC guidance, while the post-judgment interest will be based on a "statutory rate" for civil cases. This ruling follows a previous $540 million judgment against Bank of America won by the FDIC last April for underpaid deposit insurance.

feed.title: Can Burger King ever catch McDonald's?
feed.summary: This article analyzes the ambitious goal set by Burger King executives to surpass McDonald's as the nation's largest burger chain. It highlights the significant disparity in their current sales and market presence, with McDonald's being five times larger. The author outlines the immense growth Burger King would need to achieve, combined with potential stagnation from McDonald's, drawing comparisons to Chick-fil-A's growth over KFC and Domino's over Pizza Hut.

feed.title: Three former Big Four mining heads join FTI Consulting in Australia
feed.summary: FTI Consulting (NYSE: FCN) has appointed James Chapman, Steve Dyson, and Franz Wentzel as Senior Managing Directors in its Australian Transformation practice, specifically for the Transformation – Mining team. These new hires bring decades of experience from Big Four accounting firms, enhancing FTI Consulting's client-facing capabilities in Perth and Brisbane and strengthening its mining-sector advisory services. This move follows a previous addition to the team and indicates a strategic expansion of the firm's expertise in the mining and resources sector.

feed.title: State Street Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in SRG Global
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its affiliates have announced they are no longer a substantial holder in SRG Global Limited (AU:SRG), effective April 1, 2026. This divestment signifies a shift in SRG Global's institutional ownership structure. The move may affect market perceptions of institutional support for the company, which operates in the industrial and construction-related services space.

feed.title: AvalonBay Announces Q1 2026 Earnings Date
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities, Inc., a major real estate investment trust specializing in apartment communities, has scheduled the release of its first-quarter 2026 financial results for April 30, 2026, before market open. This report is critical for understanding the health of the multifamily real estate market, as AvalonBay's performance provides key insights into occupancy rates, rental pricing, and development activities within the housing sector. Investors and analysts will closely examine the results for broader economic trends and shifts in apartment demand.

feed.title: News Corp Files Form 4 Detailing Director’s Class A Share Transaction
feed.summary: News Corp (AU:NWS) has filed a Form 4 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, disclosing changes in director Masroor Siddiqui’s equity holdings. The filing details the exercise and sale of 1,644 Class A common shares on April 1, 2026, updating his beneficial ownership. The stock currently holds a Buy rating from analysts with a price target of A$44.00.

feed.title: News Corp files Form 4 detailing director’s Class A share transactions
feed.summary: News Corp (AU:NWS) has filed a Form 4 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, detailing insider transactions by director Natalie Bancroft. The filing indicates that Bancroft exercised options to acquire 1,644 Class A shares and subsequently sold the same number of shares for $24.71 each, resulting in her holding no directly owned Class A shares. This update provides transparency on insider activity for investors.

feed.title: News Corp Files Form 4 Detailing Director José María Aznar’s Share Transactions
feed.summary: News Corp has filed a Form 4 with the U.S. SEC, detailing transactions in Class A common stock by director José María Aznar. The filing discloses both an acquisition through derivative exercise and a subsequent sale, providing transparency into insider equity activity. These transactions have adjusted Aznar's direct shareholdings and reinforce compliance with U.S. and Australian reporting obligations.

feed.title: News Corp Outlines US$1bn Nasdaq Share Buy-Back, Excludes ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock in 2025. This buy-back explicitly excludes ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs), focusing on returning capital to U.S. shareholders. The flexible structure aims to enhance capital returns and EPS for Nasdaq investors while leaving the Australian CDI float and its liquidity unchanged.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan (KMI) VP Schlosser sells 6,166 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: John W. Schlosser, VP and President of Terminals at Kinder Morgan (KMI), sold 6,166 shares of Class P Common Stock on April 6, 2026, at a weighted average price of $32.934 per share. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After the sale, Schlosser directly holds 182,706 shares of Kinder Morgan stock, with individual trades ranging from $32.8501 to $33.015 per share.

feed.title: Enovix (ENVX) CLO uses 3,337 shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Enovix Corp's Chief Legal Officer, Arthi Chakravarthy, had 3,337 shares of common stock withheld at $4.97 per share to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs). This was a tax withholding transaction, not an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Chakravarthy directly holds 451,645 shares, including those issuable from RSUs and performance restricted stock units (PRSUs) scheduled for future release.

feed.title: Enovix (ENVX) CEO sees 15,569 shares withheld for RSU tax obligations
feed.summary: Enovix Corp's President and CEO, Rajendra K. Talluri, had 15,569 shares of common stock withheld on April 1, 2026, to cover tax obligations related to the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs). The shares were valued at $4.97 each. Following this transaction, Talluri directly holds 2,418,545 shares, which includes shares issuable from RSUs and performance RSUs (PRSUs) scheduled for future release.

feed.title: Oceanfirst Financial Corp. And Flushing Financial Corporation Announce Receipt Of The Requisite Shareholder Approvals For Pending Merger Transaction
feed.summary: Oceanfirst Financial Corp. and Flushing Financial Corporation have announced that they have received the necessary shareholder approvals for their pending merger transaction. This brief announcement confirms a significant step forward in the companies' plans to combine.

feed.title: OceanFirst Financial, Flushing Financial shareholders approve merger
feed.summary: Shareholders of OceanFirst Financial (OCFC) and Flushing Financial (FFIC) have approved their previously announced merger agreement. The merger has also received approval from the New York State Department of Financial Services and the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency. The transaction remains contingent on approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System and other customary closing conditions.

feed.title: OceanFirst Financial Corp. and Flushing Financial Corporation Announce Receipt of the Requisite Shareholder Approvals for Pending Merger Transaction
feed.summary: OceanFirst Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: OCFC) and Flushing Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FFIC) have jointly announced that they have received the necessary shareholder approvals for their previously announced merger. Additionally, the New York State Department of Financial Services and the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency have granted their approvals for the transaction. The merger is now contingent upon receiving regulatory approval from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System and other standard closing conditions.

feed.title: FuelCell Energy shareholders approve incentive plan amendments and board elections
feed.summary: FuelCell Energy's shareholders approved significant amendments to the company's 2018 Omnibus Incentive Plan and the 2018 Employee Stock Purchase Plan, allowing for the issuance of additional shares for equity awards and employee stock purchases. Additionally, shareholders re-elected eight directors and ratified the compensation of named executive officers and the appointment of KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm. This comes after the company recently reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue below estimates and introduced new power blocks for data centers.

feed.title: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Continues to Investigate the Officers and Directors of Extreme Networks, Inc. - EXTR
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is continuing its investigation into Extreme Networks, Inc. (NasdaqGS: EXTR) following disappointing financial results and a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges false and misleading statements were made regarding product revenue and backlog between July 2022 and January 2024. KSF is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the company's officers and/or directors.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Tactical Advantage ETF (AMEX:FDAT)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the Tactical Advantage ETF (AMEX:FDAT) using various indicators. It summarizes oscillators, moving averages, and pivot points, offering a "strong sell" signal based on the overall technical ratings. The analysis also includes explanations of technical ratings, oscillators, moving averages, and pivots, cautioning users that this information is not investment advice.

feed.title: Why Is Erasca, Inc. (ERAS) Stock Down Today?
feed.summary: Erasca, Inc. (ERAS) stock is down 3.87% at $17.12, reflecting negative investor sentiment despite strong technical indicators with the stock trading above both its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analyst sentiment is bullish, and Meyka's AI assigns ERAS an overall moderate grade of B, with future forecast models projecting varied returns. The decline comes with a 30% lower trading volume than average, suggesting selling interest.

feed.title: Republic Services moves gas pipeline at Missoula landfill
feed.summary: Republic Services has undertaken the relocation of a gas pipeline at the Missoula landfill. The article title concisely announces this activity without providing further details in the provided content.

feed.title: Barry Smith Sells 700 Shares of The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) Stock
feed.summary: Director Barry Smith sold 700 shares of The Ensign Group (NASDAQ:ENSG) stock for $137,655.00 on April 2nd, reducing his stake by 3.06% to 22,152 shares. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $1.82 EPS and 20.2% revenue growth, and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, while analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average target of $204.60.

feed.title: Altria Group Shares Rise 1.1%
feed.summary: Shares of Altria Group (NYSE:MO) saw a 1.1% increase on Monday, closing at $66.51 amidst fluctuating analyst price targets. While Citigroup raised its target to $65, Stifel Nicolaus lowered its to $68, and Jefferies Financial Group increased its to $50, the stock holds a 'hold' consensus rating. This performance is significant for the broader tobacco industry given Altria's market dominance and the ongoing regulatory and consumer shifts.

feed.title: ResMed Officer Sandercock Discloses Ongoing Insider Share Sales Under Rule 144
feed.summary: ResMed officer Brett Sandercock plans to sell 1,000 shares of vested restricted stock valued at approximately $224,310 under Rule 144. These sales, executed through a Rule 10b5-1 plan adopted in February 2025, are described as routine insider disposals for portfolio diversification rather than an indication of adverse company fundamentals. Sandercock has also sold 3,000 shares in the past three months via pre-arranged transactions.

feed.title: ResMed Director Peter Farrell Plans Further Insider Share Sale Under Rule 144
feed.summary: ResMed director Peter C. Farrell is set to sell 2,000 shares of the company's common stock on April 1, 2026, under a prearranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. This sale is part of a continuing pattern of insider disposals, which Farrell states is for portfolio diversification and does not indicate any undisclosed negative information about ResMed's operations. The stock currently holds a Buy rating from analysts with a price target of A$36.00.

feed.title: Citius Pharmaceuticals elects board members and ratifies auditor at annual meeting
feed.summary: Citius Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:CTXR) held its 2026 annual meeting where shareholders elected seven members to its board of directors for a one-year term. The company's shareholders also ratified Wolf & Company, P.C. as their independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026. The information was based on an SEC filing.

feed.title: Casey’s General Stores Joining S&P 500 This Week
feed.summary: Casey's General Stores (CASY) is set to join the S&P 500 index, replacing Hologic Inc. (HOLX). This change, announced by S&P Dow Jones Indices, will take effect before trading opens on Thursday.

feed.title: Director at Tapestry (NYSE: TPR) receives 1,392 RSU equity award
feed.summary: Tapestry (NYSE: TPR) director Matthew Madrigal was granted 1,392 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an equity award under the company's Stock Incentive Plan. These RSUs, valued at $143.70 per share, are scheduled to vest on April 6, 2027. This grant represents Madrigal's entire direct holding after the transaction.

feed.title: Stephen Keller Buys 30,000 Shares of Compass Diversified (NYSE:CODI) Stock
feed.summary: Insider Stephen Keller recently purchased 30,000 shares of Compass Diversified (NYSE:CODI) for a total of $258,300, increasing his stake to 20,000 shares after the transaction. The company's stock traded at $9.56 mid-day with a negative P/E ratio, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of its shares. Analysts generally rate CODI as a "Hold" with an average price target of $11.50.

feed.title: Does Costamare (CMRE)ʼs Locked-In Revenue and Dividends Reshape Its Risk-Return Profile?
feed.summary: Costamare Inc. (CMRE) has strengthened its revenue visibility by forward-chartering 12 vessels, bringing total contracted revenues to approximately US$3.40 billion with high fleet employment into 2027. This move underpins recent common and preferred dividend declarations but doesn't fundamentally alter the investment narrative, which hinges on translating this backlog into sustained earnings amidst the shipping industry's cyclical nature and the company's relatively high leverage. While income visibility is improved, investors should also consider the company's projected revenue decline and existing debt levels.

feed.title: Tapestry (TPR) director Matthew Madrigal files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. director Matthew Madrigal has filed an initial Form 3, which is a required statement of beneficial ownership for new insiders, indicating his status as a director. The filing, dated April 6, 2026, does not report any stock transactions or derivative holdings for Madrigal, serving solely as an initial ownership report. This highlights his new role at the company without immediate implications of stock trading activity.

feed.title: Humana Releases 2025 Impact Report on Affordable Care
feed.summary: Humana, a major healthcare provider, has released its 2025 Impact Report, detailing its efforts to make healthcare more affordable and accessible. The report highlights the company's commitment to reducing administrative burdens, expanding telehealth options, and implementing value-based care models. Humana plans to continue these initiatives, focusing on digital tools and value-based care to improve the patient experience and provide equitable access to quality care.
